summary: Land deterministic gardening recommendation scoring rubric and enforce score validation in default checks.
whyNow: Phase-1 observability is in place, so scoring can now use stable telemetry and reduce recommendation ambiguity.
expectedImpact: Prioritization quality improves through explainable, repeatable rankings with machine-checkable scoring.
nextAction: Apply the scoring model to phase-3 recommendations and keep feedback loop current.

summary: Add policy conflict detector and self-gardening safety preflight checks for review-gate enforcement.
whyNow: As pack complexity grows, conflicting guardrails and missed stop points become high-cost failure modes.
expectedImpact: Review-gate bypass risk drops and lane/main policy contradictions are caught before edits execute.
nextAction: Keep policy and safety detector snapshots current each pass and stop on failures.

summary: Add pack coverage auditor for persona/kit/directive/intent/essential linkage gaps.
whyNow: Coverage blind spots can accumulate quietly and are easier to remediate before next feature expansion.
expectedImpact: Orphaned or under-covered pack areas are surfaced early with bounded remediation targets.
nextAction: Refresh coverage snapshots on non-trivial gardening passes and remediate unresolved references immediately.
